title: Senior Radiologist at BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited:
BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited!
